scripts.dev:electron: wait-on dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.js tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electronmon --watch dist/main --watch dist/preload .
scripts.dev:electron:a: wait-on dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.js tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 CT_USER_DATA_DIR=.profiles/instance-a electronmon --watch dist/main --watch dist/preload .
scripts.dev:electron:b: wait-on dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.js tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5173 CT_USER_DATA_DIR=.profiles/instance-b electronmon --watch dist/main --watch dist/preload .
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
